targets.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN s."interval" = 'MONTH' THEN p."monthlyPriceCents" ELSE p."annualPriceCents" / 12 END), 0) / 100.0 FROM "Subscription" s JOIN "Plan" p ON p.id = s."planId" WHERE s."status" IN ('ACTIVE','TRIALING')
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM "Subscription" WHERE status IN ('ACTIVE','TRIALING')
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM "User" WHERE "createdAt" > NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM "Subscription" WHERE "canceledAt" > NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days'

SELECT date_trunc('day', "createdAt") AS time, 'signups' AS metric, COUNT(*) AS value FROM "User" WHERE "createdAt" > NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days' GROUP BY 1 UNION ALL SELECT date_trunc('day', "createdAt") AS time, 'subscriptions' AS metric, COUNT(*) AS value FROM "Subscription" WHERE "createdAt" > NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1
SELECT p.code AS metric, COUNT(*) AS value FROM "Subscription" s JOIN "Plan" p ON p.id = s."planId" WHERE s.status IN ('ACTIVE','TRIALING') GROUP BY p.code

SELECT i."createdAt", u.email, i."amountCents" / 100.0 AS amount, i.status FROM "Invoice" i JOIN "User" u ON u.id = i."userId" WHERE i.status IN ('OPEN','UNCOLLECTIBLE') AND i."createdAt" > NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days' ORDER BY i."createdAt" DESC LIMIT 25
